title: Functools, Operator Functions, Caching, and Dispatch · Composition Studio
summary: Build reusable scoring functions without obscuring cache validity or dispatch behavior. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a measured callable utility and dispatch package while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use partial application to bind stable configuration without hiding required arguments.
Use cache and lru_cache only for hashable inputs with stable effect-free semantics.
Design singledispatch registrations around first-argument type contracts and safe fallbacks.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

T = TypeVar('T')
